## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in the unofficial Codex app-server SDK.

## Checklist

- [ ] Public API or protocol behavior changes are documented.
- [ ] Schema baseline or generated code changes include provenance updates and reproducibility checks.
- [ ] Dependency changes are reflected in `NOTICE`.
- [ ] `gofmt`, `go vet ./...`, `go test ./...`, and generated-code checks pass.
- [ ] No credentials, account data, transcripts, private paths, or business data were added.
